__fixture_tag__: VENDORED SOURCE SNAPSHOT — ISO standard + thermodynamics, frozen

claim.property: minimum thermodynamic energy floor for plastic recycling (Gibbs ΔG of demixing)
claim.model: ideal-mixing entropy lower bound: ΔG_min >= T * R * sum(x_i * ln(x_i))
claim.condition: ideal mixing, 298 K reference; real recycling streams include enthalpy + non-ideal terms (much larger)

source.primary: ISO 14040:2006 — LCA framework (system boundary + functional unit)
source.secondary: Gibbs 1876 'Equilibrium of Heterogeneous Substances'; Atkins Physical Chemistry 11th ed. Ch. 5
source.citation: ISO 14040 LCA + Gibbs free-energy of mixing — recycling energy floor >= T * R * sum(x_i ln(x_i)); PET/PE 50/50 ideal floor ~ 1.72 kJ/mol at 298 K

tolerance.basis: R, T, x_i are exact; floor is ideal lower bound (real >> ideal)
